en.title: Best Fiber Supplements of 2026: Psyllium, Inulin and Prebiotic Formulas Ranked for Gut Health
en.description: The fiber supplements worth buying in 2026, ranked on fiber source and evidence, tolerability, dose per serving, third-party testing, and cost per day.

zh-tw.title: 2026 最佳膳食纖維補給排行榜：洋車前子、菊糖與益生元配方腸道健康實測推薦
zh-tw.description: 2026 年值得買的膳食纖維補給，從纖維來源與實證、腸胃耐受度、每份劑量、第三方檢驗到每日成本完整排名。

en.description: The number-one doctor-recommended fiber brand, built on psyllium husk, the one fiber with an FDA-authorized claim for lowering cholesterol, with USP Verification on select powders and a GLP-1-friendly label.

zh-tw.description: 醫師推薦度第一的纖維品牌，主成分是洋車前子，這是唯一拿到 FDA 認可可宣稱降膽固醇的纖維，部分粉劑通過 USP 認證，包裝標示 GLP-1 friendly。

en.description: The purest high-dose psyllium here, packing 6 grams of psyllium husk per teaspoon with one ingredient and nothing else, now NSF Certified after 87 years of making fiber.

zh-tw.description: 這份榜單裡最純的高劑量洋車前子，每茶匙塞進 6 克洋車前子，成分就只有這一味，做了 87 年纖維，現在還通過 NSF 認證。

en.description: A soluble prebiotic blend built on Sunfiber partially hydrolyzed guar gum plus larch arabinogalactan and apple pectin, NSF Content Certified and the gentlest option for anyone psyllium upsets.

zh-tw.description: 以 Sunfiber 部分水解瓜爾豆膠為主的水溶性益生元複方，再加落葉松阿拉伯半乳聚醣與蘋果果膠，通過 NSF 成分認證，是洋車前子會脹氣的人最溫和的選擇。

en.description: 98% pure USDA Organic whole psyllium husk with no added sugar, sodium or additives, delivering both soluble and insoluble fiber at the lowest cost per gram on this list.

zh-tw.description: 98% 純度的 USDA 有機全洋車前子殼，不加糖、不加鈉、無添加物，同時提供水溶性與非水溶性纖維，每克成本是這份榜單最低的。

en.description: Wheat dextrin that dissolves clear and taste-free into any drink, delivering 6 grams of prebiotic fiber per serving with the smoothest ramp-up for fiber-sensitive stomachs.

zh-tw.description: 小麥糊精配方，溶進任何飲料都透明無味，每份 6 克益生元纖維，是腸胃敏感的人循序增量時最不容易脹氣的一款。

en.description: 6 grams of tasteless soluble prebiotic fiber engineered to disappear into hot or cold drinks with no grit or clumping, marketed squarely at the GLP-1 crowd.

zh-tw.description: 6 克無味的水溶性益生元纖維，設計成溶進冷熱飲都不結塊、不留顆粒感，主打 GLP-1 減重族群的日常補纖。

en.description: The biggest dose here at 16 grams of fiber per serving from acacia, guar gum and larch arabinogalactan, third-party tested and built to support your body's own GLP-1 response.

zh-tw.description: 這裡單份劑量最猛的一款，每份 16 克纖維，來自阿拉伯膠、瓜爾豆膠與落葉松阿拉伯半乳聚醣，經第三方檢驗，主打支持身體自己的 GLP-1 反應。

competitors.name: Garden of Life RAW Organic Fiber

en.description: A psyllium-free whole-food blend from 15 organic sprouted seeds and grains, delivering 9 grams of soluble and insoluble fiber plus 7 grams of protein and a probiotic per serving.

zh-tw.description: 無洋車前子的全食物配方，用 15 種有機發芽種子與穀物打底，每份提供 9 克水溶性與非水溶性纖維，外加 7 克蛋白質與一株益生菌。

en.description: 500 mg psyllium husk in a Non-GMO Project Verified veggie capsule, the pick for anyone who wants the cholesterol and regularity benefits of psyllium without mixing a powder.

zh-tw.description: 500 毫克洋車前子做成 Non-GMO 認證的植物膠囊，適合想要洋車前子那套降膽固醇、顧規律好處，又懶得沖泡粉的人。

en.description: A single-ingredient organic baobab powder with a naturally citrus taste, delivering 5 grams of prebiotic fiber per scoop for people who want the cleanest possible label.

zh-tw.description: 單一成分的有機猴麵包樹果粉，帶天然柑橘味，每匙 5 克益生元纖維，給那些成分表想越乾淨越好的人。

references.title: A Dietitian's Pick of the 8 Best Fiber Supplements in 2026
We tested 20 fiber supplements — these are the best options, backed by dietitians
Which Psyllium Fiber Supplement Is Best? Top 5

en.commentary: Fiber is having its moment, and for once the hype points you at something that actually works. The average adult eats roughly half the fiber they need, and closing that gap does real things for cholesterol, blood sugar, regularity, and the fullness that keeps snacking in check. So the question is which fiber, and here I hold a firm opinion: psyllium wins. It is the most clinically studied fiber on the shelf and the only one the FDA lets a label claim can lower cholesterol. That single fact reorders the whole category. Metamucil 4-in-1 takes the top spot because it is psyllium done right at scale, it is the number-one doctor-recommended brand, it carries USP Verification on select powders, and its GLP-1-friendly label meets the biggest reason people are buying fiber in 2026. If you want the exact same active with less marketing and a bigger dose, Konsyl is my number two: one ingredient, 6 grams of psyllium husk per teaspoon, now NSF Certified. That is the purest high-dose psyllium here and the better value per gram. Third goes to Thorne FiberMend, and it earns it by solving psyllium's one real weakness. Psyllium can bloat you during the first week, and Thorne's Sunfiber guar-gum blend is the gentlest formula on this list while still being NSF Content Certified, so it is what I hand anyone whose gut rebels against husk. For value, Organic India whole husk is unbeatable at around a dollar a serving for 98% pure organic psyllium. Benefiber is the taste-free wheat dextrin you stir into coffee and forget about, ideal for a slow, tolerable ramp-up. The prebiotic-forward picks, Physician's Choice Easy Mix and Bulletproof InnerFuel, are built for the GLP-1 conversation, and InnerFuel's 16 grams per serving is the biggest single dose here if microbiome feeding is your goal. Two rules matter more than any ranking. Start low and build up over two weeks, and drink a full glass of water with every dose. Do that and the right fiber becomes the highest-return supplement in your cabinet.

highlights.title: Psyllium wins, and that decides the whole ranking
highlights.body: Psyllium husk is the most researched fiber you can buy and the only one carrying an FDA-authorized claim that it lowers cholesterol. That evidence is why four of my top four are psyllium-based. When a fiber has that much human data and a regulatory stamp behind its heart-health benefit, it earns the benefit of the doubt over trendier prebiotic blends that read well on a label but carry thinner proof.

highlights.title: Metamucil 4-in-1 is the safe default that happens to be the right one
highlights.body: Being the number-one doctor-recommended brand usually means you are paying for the name. Here it means you are getting USP-Verified psyllium, third-party proof of purity and potency, and a GLP-1-friendly formulation that lines up with why most people are shopping for fiber this year. It is the pick I would hand someone who wants to buy once and stop thinking about it.

highlights.title: Thorne FiberMend is the answer when psyllium fights back
highlights.body: The honest downside of psyllium is the first-week bloat, and for some guts it never settles. Thorne's Sunfiber partially hydrolyzed guar gum is the gentlest fiber on this list, NSF Content Certified, and it feeds your microbiome without the gas that sends people quitting fiber altogether. It costs more per serving, and for a sensitive stomach that premium buys the difference between sticking with it and giving up.

highlights.title: Buy on dose and purity, then start low and hydrate
highlights.body: Konsyl gives you 6 grams of pure psyllium per teaspoon and Organic India gives you 98% organic husk for around a dollar a serving, so you rarely need to pay up for a fancier label. Whichever you pick, ramp the dose over two weeks and take every serving with a full glass of water. Skip the water and fiber turns from your best supplement into a genuine choking risk.

zh-tw.commentary: 膳食纖維這兩年紅到不行，難得的是這波熱度真的指向有效的東西。一般成年人每天大概只吃到身體需要一半的纖維，把這個缺口補起來，對膽固醇、血糖、排便規律，還有那種讓你不會一直想吃零食的飽足感，都是實打實有幫助的。所以問題從來不是要不要補，而是補哪一種，這點我立場很明確：洋車前子勝出。它是貨架上臨床研究最多的纖維，也是唯一一款 FDA 允許在標籤上宣稱能降膽固醇的纖維。光這一條就把整個品類的排序重寫了。Metamucil 4-in-1 拿下第一，因為它把洋車前子這件事做到了規模化的極致，它是醫師推薦度第一的品牌，部分粉劑通過 USP 認證，包裝上的 GLP-1 friendly 標示又正好接住 2026 年大家買纖維最大的那個理由。如果你要的是一模一樣的有效成分，但少一點行銷、多一點劑量，Konsyl 是我的第二名：成分就一味，每茶匙 6 克洋車前子殼，現在還通過 NSF 認證，是這裡最純的高劑量洋車前子，每克也更划算。第三名給 Thorne FiberMend，它拿得理直氣壯，因為它解決了洋車前子唯一的真弱點。洋車前子頭一週容易讓你脹氣，而 Thorne 用 Sunfiber 瓜爾豆膠做的配方是這份榜單最溫和的一款，還通過 NSF 成分認證，所以只要有人的腸胃受不了洋車前子殼，我就會把這罐遞給他。講性價比，Organic India 全洋車前子殼無敵，一份大概台幣十幾塊就買到 98% 純度的有機洋車前子。Benefiber 是那種倒進咖啡就忘記它存在的無味小麥糊精，適合慢慢、無痛地增量。益生元路線的 Physician's Choice Easy Mix 跟 Bulletproof InnerFuel 是為 GLP-1 這個話題打造的，InnerFuel 每份 16 克是這裡單份劑量最高的，如果你的目標是餵飽腸道菌相，選它。有兩個原則比任何排名都重要。第一，劑量分兩週慢慢往上加。第二，每一份都配一整杯水喝。做到這兩點，對的纖維就是你櫃子裡投報率最高的那罐補給。

highlights.title: 洋車前子勝出，這一點決定了整份排名
highlights.body: 洋車前子殼是你買得到的纖維裡研究最多的，也是唯一一款拿到 FDA 認可、能在標籤上宣稱降膽固醇的纖維。這就是為什麼我前四名有四款都是洋車前子基底。當一款纖維累積這麼多人體數據，護心好處還有法規背書，它理所當然贏過那些標籤好看、實證卻薄很多的時髦益生元複方。

highlights.title: Metamucil 4-in-1 是最安全的預設值，剛好也是最對的那個
highlights.body: 醫師推薦度第一通常代表你在為品牌名字多付錢。但這一款不一樣，你拿到的是通過 USP 認證的洋車前子，純度與含量都有第三方背書，還有正好對上今年大家買纖維理由的 GLP-1 friendly 配方。這是我會直接遞給那種想買一次、之後就不用再煩惱的人的選擇。

highlights.title: 洋車前子讓你脹氣時，Thorne FiberMend 就是答案
highlights.body: 洋車前子誠實講就是頭一週會脹氣，有些人的腸胃甚至一直適應不了。Thorne 用的 Sunfiber 部分水解瓜爾豆膠是這份榜單最溫和的纖維，通過 NSF 成分認證，餵飽腸道菌相又不會產生那種讓人乾脆放棄補纖的脹氣。它每份比較貴，但對敏感腸胃來說，這個溢價換到的就是「能一直吃下去」跟「直接放棄」的差別。

highlights.title: 照劑量與純度買，然後從低劑量開始、記得配水
highlights.body: Konsyl 每茶匙給你 6 克純洋車前子，Organic India 一份大概台幣十幾塊就是 98% 有機洋車前子殼，所以你其實很少需要為更花俏的標籤多付錢。不管你挑哪一款，劑量都要分兩週慢慢往上加，每一份都配一整杯水喝下去。少了那杯水，纖維會從你最強的補給變成真正會噎到的風險。

references.title: A Dietitian's Pick of the 8 Best Fiber Supplements in 2026
Psyllium Fiber Supplements Review & Top Pick
We tested 20 fiber supplements, backed by dietitians

en.commentary: Metamucil holds my number one because psyllium remains the most evidence-backed fiber you can buy, and it is the only fiber supplement with an FDA-authorized heart-health claim for LDL cholesterol. Reviews this cycle reinforce the point that seven to ten grams of psyllium daily produces a clinically meaningful five to ten percent LDL reduction, which is exactly why I keep its source score high. Konsyl stays second for purists, since its powder is 100 percent psyllium husk with a strong dose per serving. Thorne FiberMend holds third as my pick for sensitive stomachs, with the gentlest tolerability in this group and excellent third party testing. There is one quality theme worth calling out from the latest lab work. ConsumerLab testing found meaningful lead variation across psyllium products, with the cleanest options holding at one microgram or less per four gram serving. That is why I keep the testing score front and center, since verified purity matters as much as fiber grams. Organic India stays fourth as the value organic pick, USDA certified and additive free at a friendly price. Benefiber remains my choice for people who want an invisible, easy-mixing prebiotic that stirs clear into any drink. My guidance is unchanged: start low, build your dose over a week or two, drink plenty of water, and choose a product with clean third party results.

highlights.title: Metamucil leads on evidence
highlights.body: Psyllium is the only fiber with an FDA-authorized heart claim, and seven to ten grams daily cuts LDL five to ten percent, so it keeps my top spot.

highlights.title: Purity deserves attention
highlights.body: ConsumerLab found meaningful lead variation across psyllium products, with the cleanest at one microgram or less per serving, so verified testing stays central to my scores.

highlights.title: Thorne FiberMend for sensitive stomachs
highlights.body: The gentlest tolerability in this group plus excellent third party testing keep it my pick for anyone who reacts to psyllium bulk.

highlights.title: Organic India is the value organic pick
highlights.body: USDA certified, additive free, and friendly on price, it holds fourth for readers who want a clean organic husk.

highlights.title: Ramp up slowly with water
highlights.body: Start with a small dose, build over a week or two, and drink plenty of water to keep any fiber comfortable and effective.

zh-tw.commentary: Metamucil 穩坐我的第一，因為洋車前子還是你買得到最有實證的膳食纖維，也是唯一拿到美國 FDA 心臟健康聲明、能講降低壞膽固醇的纖維補充品。這一輪的評測再次強調，每天七到十克洋車前子可以帶來臨床上有意義的、五到十趴的壞膽固醇下降，這正是我把它來源分給那麼高的原因。Konsyl 守第二，純粹派會愛，粉就是 100 趴洋車前子殼，單份劑量又足。Thorne FiberMend 第三，是我給腸胃敏感者的首選，這群裡耐受度最溫和，第三方檢驗也很漂亮。最新的實驗室資料有個品質重點值得講，ConsumerLab 檢測發現各家洋車前子的鉛含量差異不小，最乾淨的能守在每四克一份含一微克以下。所以我一直把檢驗分數擺在前面，驗證過的純淨度跟纖維克數一樣重要。Organic India 守第四，走有機高 CP 路線，USDA 認證、無添加，價格又親切。Benefiber 還是我給想要無感、好沖開的益生元的人，攪一攪就化在任何飲料裡。我的建議沒變，從少量開始，一兩週慢慢加量，水要喝夠，挑一款第三方檢驗乾淨的產品。

highlights.title: Metamucil 靠實證領先
highlights.body: 洋車前子是唯一拿到 FDA 心臟聲明的纖維，每天七到十克能降壞膽固醇五到十趴，穩坐第一。

highlights.title: 純淨度值得留意
highlights.body: ConsumerLab 發現各家洋車前子鉛含量差異不小，最乾淨的每份一微克以下，所以驗證分數一直是我評分核心。

highlights.title: Thorne FiberMend 給敏感腸胃
highlights.body: 這群裡耐受度最溫和，第三方檢驗漂亮，對洋車前子會脹氣的人我推它。

highlights.title: Organic India 有機高 CP
highlights.body: USDA 認證、無添加、價格親切，想要乾淨有機殼的人它守第四。

highlights.title: 慢慢加量、水要喝夠
highlights.body: 從小份開始，一兩週慢慢往上加，水喝夠，纖維才吃得舒服又有效。

references.title: A Dietitian Pick of the 8 Best Fiber Supplements in 2026
Best Fiber Supplements in the US (2026): An Evidence-Based Comparison
Psyllium Fiber Supplements Review & Top Pick

en.commentary: Metamucil 4-in-1 Psyllium keeps my top spot because psyllium is the fiber with the deepest clinical evidence base, and Metamucil delivers it with USP verification and the only FDA-authorized heart-health claim for LDL reduction. It is the clinical standard for a reason, and it is the one I recommend to anyone starting out. Konsyl stays at number two, and fresh 2026 coverage backs why I rate it so highly: pharmaceutical-grade purity with zero additives and higher fiber density per serving, so you reach a meaningful dose with fewer scoops. If you want maximum psyllium with nothing extra, Konsyl is the pick. Thorne FiberMend holds number three for anyone whose gut is sensitive, because its gentler blend is the easiest to tolerate while you ramp up. Organic India Whole Husk stays my value pick with a clean profile at the lowest cost per dose. Benefiber remains high for people who want a taste-free, grit-free mix in coffee or water. Nothing shifted this week, so the order holds. The one thing I stress every time: whatever you pick, take it with a full glass of water and start with a single daily serving, increasing over a week or two. Psyllium absorbs about ten times its weight in water, so hydration is what separates a smooth start from a rough one. Get that right and any supplement in this top five will do its job.

highlights.title: Metamucil is the clinical standard
highlights.body: Psyllium has the deepest evidence base, and Metamucil pairs it with USP verification and an FDA heart-health claim.

highlights.title: Konsyl for maximum psyllium
highlights.body: Pharmaceutical-grade purity, zero additives, and higher fiber density per scoop so you hit a real dose faster.

highlights.title: Thorne FiberMend for sensitive guts
highlights.body: A gentler blend makes it the easiest to tolerate while you ramp your daily dose up over a couple of weeks.

highlights.title: Hydration makes or breaks it
highlights.body: Psyllium absorbs about ten times its weight in water. Take it with a full glass and start slow for a smooth start.

zh-tw.commentary: Metamucil 4-in-1 洋車前子這週還是我的第一,因為洋車前子是臨床證據最紮實的纖維,而 Metamucil 有 USP 認證,還握有唯一一個 FDA 核准、能降 LDL 的心臟健康標示。它是臨床標準有它的道理,剛開始補纖維的人我就推它。Konsyl 排第二,2026 年的評測也印證我為什麼給它這麼高:藥廠級純度、零添加,每份纖維密度又更高,舀比較少匙就能達到有意義的劑量。想要純洋車前子、什麼雜的都不要,選 Konsyl。Thorne FiberMend 第三名給腸胃敏感的人,配方溫和,慢慢加量的過程最好適應。Organic India 全殼是我的 CP 值選擇,成分乾淨、每份成本最低。Benefiber 我留在前段,適合想要無味、無顆粒感、丟咖啡或水裡都不影響口感的人。這禮拜沒變動,名單維持。我每次都要強調一件事:不管選哪個,一定要配一整杯水,而且從每天一份開始,一兩週內慢慢往上加。洋車前子會吸大約自身十倍重的水,補水做對了,開頭就順,做錯了就脹氣。這件事顧好,前五名隨便挑都能發揮該有的效果。

highlights.title: Metamucil 是臨床標準
highlights.body: 洋車前子證據最紮實,Metamucil 又有 USP 認證跟 FDA 心臟健康標示。

highlights.title: Konsyl 要純洋車前子就選它
highlights.body: 藥廠級純度、零添加、每匙纖維密度更高,更快達到有效劑量。

highlights.title: Thorne FiberMend 給敏感腸胃
highlights.body: 配方溫和,慢慢加量的那一兩週最好適應。

highlights.title: 補水決定成敗
highlights.body: 洋車前子會吸自身約十倍重的水。配一整杯水、從少量開始,開頭才會順。

references.title: Psyllium Fiber Supplements Review & Top Pick
A Dietitian's Pick of the 8 Best Fiber Supplements in 2026
We tested 20 fiber supplements, these are the best options

en.commentary: The headline this week is a quality warning, and it sharpens my rankings rather than upends them. ConsumerLab's psyllium testing found four of nine products carrying excessive lead. That is a genuine reason to lead with brands that verify what goes in the tub. Metamucil 4-in-1 stays at rank one because dietitians keep naming it the best overall pick for the widest range of people, and its testing and psyllium source both score high. Konsyl holds second on a heavier per-scoop psyllium dose for anyone who wants maximum soluble fiber with minimal filler. Thorne FiberMend keeps third because it is the gentlest option I recommend, a good fit for sensitive guts that cramp on raw psyllium, and its third-party testing is reassuring given this week's contamination news. Organic India stays fourth, still the value champion in whole-husk psyllium, though the lead findings across the category are exactly why I want to see certification on any organic husk product. Benefiber and Physicians Choice hold their tolerability-first spots for people who prioritize an easy, no-grit mix. Psyllium remains the most studied fiber on the shelf and the only one with an FDA-qualified claim for cholesterol, so I am keeping the psyllium-first order intact. No rank moves this week. The takeaway is simpler than a reshuffle: buy tested, and this contamination report tells you why.

highlights.title: Lead findings reward tested brands
highlights.body: ConsumerLab flagged four of nine psyllium products for excess lead. That is why my top ranks lean on brands with verified testing, not bargain bins.

highlights.title: Metamucil stays the all-rounder
highlights.body: Dietitians keep naming the 4-in-1 the best overall pick for the widest range of people. Strong source and testing scores hold it at rank one.

highlights.title: Thorne FiberMend for sensitive guts
highlights.body: The gentlest option I recommend, and its third-party testing reads as a real asset the week a contamination report drops. It stays my pick for easily irritated stomachs.

highlights.title: Organic India still the value husk
highlights.body: The whole-husk value champion holds fourth. Given the category lead findings, I want certification on any organic husk, and this one earns its place.

zh-tw.commentary: 這週的頭條是一則品質警訊,它讓我的排名更篤定,而不是被翻盤。ConsumerLab 測洋車前子,九款裡有四款鉛含量超標。這就是我把有做原料把關的品牌放前面的實在理由。Metamucil 4-in-1 守住第一,因為營養師一直把它選為適合最多人的整體首選,檢驗跟洋車前子來源兩項分數都高。Konsyl 排第二,每匙洋車前子給得更足,想要最多水溶性纖維、最少填充料的人很適合。Thorne FiberMend 保住第三,它是我推薦裡最溫和的一款,腸胃敏感、吃生洋車前子會絞痛的人很合拍,而且在這種爆出污染消息的一週,它的第三方檢驗特別讓人放心。Organic India 排第四,還是全殼洋車前子裡的 CP 值王,不過整個品類都驗出鉛,正好提醒我,任何有機殼產品我都想看到認證。Benefiber 跟 Physicians Choice 守住主打好入口的位置,適合最在意沖起來不卡喉、好溶解的人。洋車前子到現在還是架上研究最多的纖維,也是唯一拿到 FDA 認可降膽固醇宣稱的,所以我把洋車前子優先的排序整個保留。這週沒有名次變動。結論比重排更單純,買有檢驗的,這份污染報告就是原因。

highlights.title: 驗出鉛,有檢驗的品牌更吃香
highlights.body: ConsumerLab 標出九款洋車前子有四款鉛超標。這就是我前段名次都押在有檢驗品牌、不碰便宜貨的原因。

highlights.title: Metamucil 全能守第一
highlights.body: 營養師一直把 4-in-1 選為適合最多人的整體首選,來源跟檢驗分數都高,穩住第一。

highlights.title: 腸胃敏感選 Thorne FiberMend
highlights.body: 我推薦裡最溫和的一款,爆出污染消息這週它的第三方檢驗更顯珍貴。腸胃容易鬧脾氣的人就選它。

highlights.title: Organic India 仍是高 CP 全殼
highlights.body: 全殼洋車前子的 CP 值王,守住第四。品類都驗出鉛,有機殼我都想看認證,這款站得住腳。

references.title: A Dietitian's Pick of the 8 Best Fiber Supplements in 2026
Best Psyllium Supplement 2026: Ranked by Cost per Gram of Fiber
Psyllium Fiber Supplements Review & Top Pick

en.commentary: My verdict this week holds steady: Metamucil's 4-in-1 psyllium stays my first pick because psyllium remains the only fiber with an FDA-qualified health claim for cholesterol reduction, and Metamucil delivers it in the most consistent, widely available format. Konsyl keeps second for anyone who wants a higher fiber dose per scoop with almost no additives, which is exactly what I reach for when I need results fast. Thorne FiberMend earns its third spot on tolerability. It mixes clear, stays down easy, and rarely triggers the bloating that scares people off fiber in the first week. Fresh dietitian roundups this month again spotlight Organic India's whole-husk psyllium for combining soluble and insoluble fiber, and I keep it at fourth on the strength of that value and clean sourcing. The genuinely useful market note is on cost per gram of fiber: plain husk powder wins by a wide margin over capsules and branded blends. That is why NOW Psyllium Husk holds a strong value score even at ninth overall. If your only goal is grams of soluble fiber per dollar, plain husk is the smart buy, and I score it that way. Benefiber stays my pick for the gentlest daily start because wheat dextrin dissolves invisibly into coffee or water. For most readers the honest advice is unchanged: pick psyllium, start at half a dose, drink enough water, and build up over a week. The rankings reflect a mature category where sourcing, testing, and tolerability separate the leaders more than any single new launch.

highlights.title: Metamucil holds the top
highlights.body: Psyllium is the only fiber with an FDA-qualified cholesterol claim, and Metamucil delivers it in the most consistent, available format. That reliability keeps it first.

highlights.title: Plain husk wins on value
highlights.body: Cost-per-gram analysis this month confirms plain psyllium husk beats capsules and branded blends by a wide margin. NOW Psyllium keeps a strong value score for that reason.

highlights.title: Thorne for sensitive guts
highlights.body: FiberMend mixes clear and stays down easy, rarely triggering the first-week bloating that makes people quit fiber. It stays my tolerability pick at third.

highlights.title: Start low, hydrate
highlights.body: My unchanged advice: begin at half a dose, drink plenty of water, and build up across a week. Every leader here rewards that patience.

zh-tw.commentary: 這週我的看法沒變，Metamucil 的 4 合 1 洋車前子還是我的首選。原因很實在，洋車前子是唯一拿到 FDA 降膽固醇健康聲明的膳食纖維，而 Metamucil 把它做成最穩定、最好買到的版本，藥妝店隨手就有。Konsyl 守住第二，它每匙纖維量更高，添加物又少，我趕時間想快點見效時就是拿它。Thorne FiberMend 排第三靠的是溫和度，沖開是清澈的，喝下去很順，很少造成第一週那種讓人打退堂鼓的脹氣。這個月的營養師精選榜又點名 Organic India 的全殼洋車前子，同時有水溶性和非水溶性纖維，加上乾淨的原料來源，我讓它維持第四。這週最有用的市場情報是每克纖維的成本，純殼粉大勝膠囊和品牌配方一大截，所以 NOW 洋車前子雖然總排第九，划算度分數還是很高。你要是只在乎每一塊錢買到幾克水溶性纖維，純殼粉就是聰明買法，我的分數也這樣給。Benefiber 依然是我推薦的溫和入門款，小麥糊精溶進咖啡或水裡幾乎看不出來。給多數讀者的老實建議還是那句話，選洋車前子，從半份開始，水喝夠，一週內慢慢加量。這份排名反映的是一個成熟品類，拉開差距的是原料、檢驗和腸胃耐受度，而不是哪一款新品。

highlights.title: Metamucil 穩坐第一
highlights.body: 洋車前子是唯一有 FDA 降膽固醇聲明的纖維，Metamucil 把它做成最穩定好買的版本，這份可靠讓它守住龍頭。

highlights.title: 純殼粉最划算
highlights.body: 這個月的每克成本分析確認，純洋車前子殼粉大勝膠囊和品牌配方。NOW 洋車前子的划算度分數因此維持高檔。

highlights.title: 腸胃敏感選 Thorne
highlights.body: FiberMend 沖開清澈、喝下去順口，很少引起第一週脹氣讓人放棄。溫和度這項它守住第三。

highlights.title: 從少量開始、補足水分
highlights.body: 我一貫的建議，半份起步、水喝夠、一週內慢慢加。這份榜上的每個領先者都獎勵這份耐心。

references.title: A Dietitian's Pick of the 8 Best Fiber Supplements in 2026
Psyllium Fiber Supplements Review & Top Pick
Which Psyllium Fiber Supplement Is Best? Top 5

en.commentary: I am moving Konsyl to the top this week, and the reason is a real one. A newly filed lawsuit alleges that Procter and Gamble failed to disclose lead levels in some Metamucil products. That is an allegation, not a finding, and Metamucil remains an excellent psyllium supplement, so it stays a close second. But when a category leans this heavily on purity and third-party verification, the tie goes to the product with the cleanest story right now, and that is Konsyl. Konsyl is about as pure as psyllium gets: a high fiber source score, a strong 6 gram dose per serving that beats most rivals, and a price that undercuts the name brands. It is the psyllium I reach for when I want the fiber and nothing else in the jar. Metamucil still earns its number two on the widest evidence base in the category, including psyllium's FDA-authorized heart-health claim for LDL reduction, and it remains the most doctor-recommended brand for a reason. Thorne FiberMend holds third as the gentlest option, the pick for sensitive guts that cannot tolerate a full psyllium load. Organic India whole husk stays fourth on unbeatable value and a clean organic source. The rest of the field is unchanged. Psyllium remains the backbone of this list because it is the only fiber with a heart-health claim behind randomized trial data, and 7 to 10 grams daily is the target that actually moves LDL.

highlights.title: Konsyl takes the top on a clean record
highlights.body: With a lead-disclosure lawsuit now hanging over a rival, Konsyl's pure psyllium, 6 gram dose, and below-name-brand price make it the pick I trust most this week for pure fiber and nothing else.

highlights.title: Metamucil stays a close second
highlights.body: The allegation is unproven and Metamucil still carries the widest evidence base here, including psyllium's FDA heart-health claim. It remains the most doctor-recommended brand and an excellent daily fiber.

highlights.title: Psyllium's heart-health claim anchors the list
highlights.body: Psyllium is the only fiber with an FDA-authorized LDL claim backed by randomized trial data. Seven to ten grams daily produces a meaningful 5 to 10 percent LDL drop, which is why psyllium leads.

highlights.title: Thorne FiberMend is the gentle pick
highlights.body: The most tolerable option here, FiberMend suits sensitive guts that cannot handle a full psyllium load. Top third-party testing scores make it the low-bloat choice worth its premium.

highlights.title: Organic India is the value play
highlights.body: Whole husk psyllium with a clean organic source and the best value score in the group. For IBS-C, its non-fermentable bulk moves things along, and the price is hard to beat.

zh-tw.commentary: 這週我把 Konsyl 換上第一，理由很實在。一起新提起的訴訟指控寶僑沒有揭露部分 Metamucil 產品的鉛含量。這只是指控，還不是定讞，而且 Metamucil 依然是很優秀的洋車前子補充品，所以它守在很接近的第二。不過當一個類別這麼看重純度跟第三方驗證，現在故事最乾淨的產品就該拿下平手裡的上位，那就是 Konsyl。Konsyl 大概是洋車前子能做到最純的程度：纖維來源評分高，每份紮實的 6 克劑量贏過大多數對手，價格還比名牌便宜。當我只想要纖維、罐子裡不要別的東西時，我就拿 Konsyl。Metamucil 還是穩坐第二，靠的是這個類別最廣的實證基礎，包括洋車前子那個 FDA 核准的降 LDL 護心宣稱，它是最多醫師推薦的品牌不是沒道理。Thorne FiberMend 守第三，是最溫和的選擇，腸胃敏感、受不了整份洋車前子的人就選它。Organic India 全粒外殼守第四，靠無敵性價比跟乾淨的有機來源。其餘名次不動。洋車前子還是這份榜單的骨幹，因為它是唯一有隨機試驗數據撐腰、拿到護心宣稱的纖維，每天 7 到 10 克才是真的能降 LDL 的目標量。

highlights.title: Konsyl 靠乾淨紀錄登頂
highlights.body: 對手現在頭上掛著鉛揭露訴訟，Konsyl 的純洋車前子、6 克劑量、比名牌便宜的價格，讓它成為這週我最信任的選擇，只要純纖維不要別的。

highlights.title: Metamucil 守在很接近的第二
highlights.body: 指控尚未證實，Metamucil 依然有這裡最廣的實證基礎，包括洋車前子的 FDA 護心宣稱。它還是最多醫師推薦的品牌，也是優秀的日常纖維。

highlights.title: 洋車前子的護心宣稱撐起整份榜
highlights.body: 洋車前子是唯一有隨機試驗數據撐腰、拿到 FDA 降 LDL 宣稱的纖維。每天 7 到 10 克能讓 LDL 有意義地降 5 到 10%，這就是它領先的原因。

highlights.title: Thorne FiberMend 是溫和派首選
highlights.body: 這裡最好耐受的選擇，FiberMend 適合腸胃敏感、吃不消整份洋車前子的人。第三方檢驗評分頂尖，是值得那個溢價的低脹氣選項。

highlights.title: Organic India 是性價比之選
highlights.body: 全粒外殼洋車前子，有機來源乾淨，性價比評分是全組最高。對便秘型腸躁，它不發酵的膨脹體積能把東西往前推，價格又難以匹敵。
